top_signals.title: Stocks Rise, Oil Falls on Hopes for US-Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Hopes for a diplomatic way out of the war in Iran lifted stocks and bonds as oil dropped on speculation that a deal would pave the way for a revival of energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
